welcome.title: Stop wasting money on groceries.
welcome.subtitle: Penny Pantry helps households catch duplicate buys, expiring food, and money leaks — before they hit your wallet.

goals.title: What would you like help with?
goals.subtitle: Choose all that apply — we'll personalize your first insights.

try.title: Try it now
try.subtitle: Add real grocery data so we can show you what Penny Pantry finds.
try.noAccount: No account required for this step.
try.scan_receiptBody: See spending and duplicate-buy patterns from a real receipt.
try.add_manualBody: Track a pantry item without scanning.

value.title: Here's what we found
value.headlineDefault: Households lose money on groceries every week
value.headlineSaveMoney: Based on your data — here's where money may be leaking
value.headlineReduceWaste: Items at risk of going to waste
value.headlineOrganize: Pantry overlaps that could cost you
value.headlineFeedFamily: Smarter shopping starts with what you already have
value.labeledEstimate: Conservative estimate from your saved data
value.conservativeEstimate: Typical household estimate — add more data for precision
value.fallbackTitle: Keep scanning to sharpen this report
value.fallbackBody: Each receipt and pantry item makes your money leak report more accurate.
value.noDataSubtitle: Add a few groceries or scan a receipt to receive personalized savings, spending, and pantry insights.
value.noDataPreviewBody: Pro continuously monitors your pantry, alerts you before food expires, helps prevent duplicate purchases, and uncovers opportunities to save money every time you shop.
value.continue: See how Pro saves for you

automation.title: What Pro keeps doing for you
automation.subtitle: Penny Pantry watches your groceries so you don't have to.
automation.expiryAlerts: Expiry alerts before food goes to waste
automation.duplicateCatch: Duplicate rebuy warnings on your shopping list
automation.leakTracking: Money leak tracking from receipts and pantry
automation.sharedLists: Shared lists and sync for households
automation.reminders: Low-stock reminders and smart sale alerts
automation.note: Free tier shows the value — Pro and Household keep it running automatically.

subscription.roiTitle: Your data suggests savings worth protecting
subscription.roiBody: We estimate {{amount}} at risk from your groceries. Pro from {{proPrice}}/mo helps catch it automatically.

save.subtitle: Track spending and save more every day.

compare.subtitle: Find the best deals across stores before you buy.

signup.headline: Save money on
signup.subheadline: Smart grocery budgeting, price comparison, and lists — all in one place.

signin.heading: Welcome back
signin.errorGeneric: Could not sign in. Please check your credentials.
signin.errorInvalidOrNew: Incorrect email or password — or you may not have an email account yet.
signin.oauthOnlyHint: This account uses {{provider}} sign-in, not a password.
signin.oauthOnlyAction: Use the button below to sign in with Google.

signup.heading: Create your account
signup.subheading: Start saving money on every shop.
signup.name: Name
signup.termsPrefix: By continuing you agree to our
signup.errorEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
signup.errorPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters.
signup.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
signup.verifyBody: We sent a verification link to {{email}}.
signup.verifyHints: Click the link to verify your account. Check spam or Promotions if you don't see it within a few minutes.

forgotPassword.heading: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subheading: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.successTitleGeneric: Check your email if you have an account
forgotPassword.successBodySent: We sent a reset link to {{email}}.
forgotPassword.successBodyGeneric: If an account exists for {{email}}, you'll receive a reset link shortly.
forgotPassword.successHints: Check spam or Promotions. Wait 2–5 minutes. Password reset only works if you signed up with email — use Continue with Google if you used Google instead.
forgotPassword.oauthOnlyBody: This account uses {{provider}} sign-in, not a password. Tap "{{provider}}" on the sign-in screen, or set a password from Settings after signing in with {{provider}}.
forgotPassword.errorEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
forgotPassword.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

paywall.title: Choose your plan
paywall.headline: Stop wasting money on food you already bought.
paywall.subhead: Catch duplicate rebuys, expiring pantry items, and money leaks before they hit your wallet.
paywall.roiBody: Households waste an estimated $25+/month on duplicate groceries and food that expires unused. Penny Pantry helps you catch it — for less than one forgotten item.
paywall.roiFormula: At-risk $ = duplicate list items + repeat rebuys, priced from your saved receipts (conservative estimate).
paywall.outcomeSubtitle: Turn receipts into waste prevention — not guesswork.

save.title: Waste prevention
save.body: Expiry alerts and pantry tracking so food doesn't go to waste.

track.title: Smart rebuy
track.body: Catch duplicate purchases before you buy what you already have.

alerts.title: Money leak tracking
alerts.body: See what's at risk from overlaps, repeat buys, and expiring items.

paywall.freeTagline: See the value — with blind spots
paywall.trialSubtext: Full Pro access for 7 days. No payment required.
paywall.familyCtaSubtext: Shared household workspace — invite members free.
paywall.familySubtitle: One shared household economy. Invite members free.
paywall.signInForFamilySubscribe: Sign in to subscribe to Family workspace.
paywall.signInForProSubscribe: Sign in to subscribe to Pro.
paywall.devPreviewBannerBody: Skip Stripe — preview the Personal | My Household switcher, Family branding, and invite UI locally.

billingDisclaimer.stripe: Secure checkout powered by Stripe. Manage or cancel anytime from your subscription settings.
billingDisclaimer.revenuecat: Subscriptions are billed through the App Store or Google Play. Manage or cancel in your device subscription settings.
billingDisclaimer.mock: Dev mock billing — no payment processed. Subscription is stored locally on this device.
billingDisclaimer.webUnconfigured: Web billing is not configured yet. Add Stripe env vars on Vercel or use mock mode locally.
billingDisclaimer.nativeUnconfigured: In-app purchases are not configured yet. Set RevenueCat API keys for native builds.

free.noLeakReport: Partial money leak report (blind spots only)
free.limitedHistory: Limited history — can't see full leak patterns

success.joinedNoSub: You're in {{name}}, but the household subscription isn't active yet. Ask the owner to renew.

workspace.personalA11y: Personal — only your receipts and pantry
workspace.familyWorkspaceHint: {{name}} — shared receipts, pantry, and lists. Separate from your Personal profile.

workspace.saveToHintFamily: Saving to {{name}} — household data stays separate from Personal.
workspace.lockedHint: Subscribe to the Household plan to unlock a shared workspace for receipts, pantry, lists, and spending.

settings.title: Settings
settings.displayNameHint: Used in your home screen greeting
settings.householdHint: Personal and household data stay separate. Family members join free — one payer funds the workspace.
settings.pushNotificationsSubtitle: Get alerts on your phone when prices change, deals appear, or your household updates.
settings.pushNotificationsIntro: Choose which alerts Penny Pantry sends to your phone. Price and budget alerts respect your tracked items and weekly limits.
settings.pushNotificationsWebNote: You can set alert preferences here on any device. OS push alerts are delivered on iOS and Android only; on web, matching alerts appear in-app while you use Penny Pantry.
settings.pushNotificationsMasterHint: Allow Penny Pantry to send alerts to your phone when you're not in the app
settings.pushPermissionNeeded: Turn on notifications in your phone settings to receive price and budget alerts.
settings.pushPermissionDenied: Notifications are blocked. Open your phone settings to allow Penny Pantry alerts.
settings.priceDropAlertsHint: Notify when a tracked item's price drops
settings.priceChangeAlertsHint: Notify when a tracked item's price changes
settings.saleAlertsHint: Notify when watched items go on sale
settings.cheaperStoreAlertsHint: Notify when the same items cost less at another store
settings.budgetAlertsHint: Notify when approaching your weekly grocery limit
settings.weeklySummaryAlertsHint: A quick recap of your grocery spending each week
settings.familyListAlertsHint: Notify when someone updates a shared shopping list
settings.pantryLowAlertsHint: Notify when pantry items drop below your low-stock threshold
settings.householdReceiptAlertsHint: Notify when a family member saves a receipt to your shared workspace
settings.pushNotificationsDevTestsHint: Send sample local notifications to verify delivery on this device.
settings.manageTrackedAlertsHint: View and edit price alert rules for items you watch
settings.openLastListHint: Resume the shopping list you viewed last
settings.livePriceEstimatesHint: Compare store totals on Home — Pro unlocks the cheapest cart across your full list
settings.scanningInfo: Receipts are scanned automatically. Scanning usually takes 15–45 seconds; long receipts can take up to 2 minutes. Every scan opens for review before it's saved.
settings.themeHint: Personalize Penny Pantry with Pro themes
settings.themeLocked: Upgrade to Pro to unlock custom themes
settings.appearanceLockedFamilyScope: Switch to Family workspace for Pro themes, fonts, and avatars
settings.fontHint: System font is free; Pro unlocks custom typefaces
settings.fontLocked: Upgrade to Pro to unlock custom fonts
settings.avatarHint: Pick a character for your home greeting (Pro)
settings.avatarLocked: Upgrade to Pro to unlock custom avatars
settings.languageHint: Changes the language across the app
settings.trackAlertsSub: Watch items and set target-price alerts
settings.signedIn: Signed in with your Penny Pantry account.
settings.deleteGuestHint: Remove all receipts, lists, and preferences stored on this device.
settings.deleteAccountHint: Permanently delete your cloud account and clear local app data.
settings.devFreeCartPreviewHint: Force the home price estimates card to show the free-tier experience (2 items + upgrade banner).
settings.devFreeCartPreviewAdminHint: Admin accounts normally see full access. Set tier to Free or enable this toggle to preview the free experience.
settings.devFreeCartPreviewOn: Free cart preview active on Home
settings.devFamilyPreviewHint: Simulates a Household purchase — enables the Personal | My Household switcher without Stripe.
settings.devFamilyRoleHint: Simulate leader vs member Pro gating while preview is active.
settings.shareAppSub: Tell friends about smart grocery savings
settings.shareMessage: Save money on every shop with Penny Pantry — smart budgeting, price comparison, and grocery lists. https://pennypantry.xyz
settings.changeEmailHint: We'll send a confirmation link to your new address. Your current email stays active until you confirm.
settings.changeEmailPending: Check {{email}} for a confirmation link to finish updating your email.
settings.changeEmailFailed: Could not update email. Please try again.
settings.changeEmailConfirmed: Your email address was updated successfully.

changeEmailErrors.auth_unavailable: Sign-in is not available right now. Please try again later.
changeEmailErrors.sign_in_required: Sign in to change your email address.
changeEmailErrors.same_email: Enter a different email address than your current one.
changeEmailErrors.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
changeEmailErrors.email_in_use: That email is already linked to another account. Try signing in with it, or choose a different address.
changeEmailErrors.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please wait a minute and try again.
changeEmailErrors.reauthentication_required: For security, sign out and sign back in, then try changing your email again.
changeEmailErrors.oauth_only: This account signs in with Google or Apple. Manage your login email through that provider, or add a password first.
changeEmailErrors.redirect_not_allowed: Email change could not start because the app redirect URL is not configured. Contact support if this continues.
changeEmailErrors.generic: Could not update email. Please try again.

privacy.settingsSub: Community sharing, receipt storage, and data deletion

communitySharing.description: Help improve Penny Pantry by allowing anonymous product pricing from your receipts to improve our grocery price database. Personal information is never included.

receiptStorage.title: How should we save this receipt?
receiptStorage.subtitle: Receipt images stay on your device. Choose what to keep after scanning.
receiptStorage.imageAndDataHint: Keep the photo and parsed line items for your history.
receiptStorage.dataOnlyHint: Store prices and items without keeping the receipt photo.
receiptStorage.required: Choose whether to save the receipt image or extracted data only.

privacy.deleteAllReceiptsHint: Permanently removes every receipt and line item stored on this device for your account.
privacy.deleteAllReceiptsMessage: This permanently deletes all receipt history on this device. This cannot be undone.

pennyGreen.name: Penny Green
pennyGreen.description: Classic brand look — clean white with fresh green accents.

midnightSlate.name: Midnight Slate
midnightSlate.description: Dark navy with teal highlights for a premium, focused feel.

sunriseCoral.name: Sunrise Coral
sunriseCoral.description: Warm cream tones with a vibrant coral accent.

oceanBlue.name: Ocean Blue
oceanBlue.description: Cool, calm whites paired with deep ocean blue.

lavenderPro.name: Lavender Pro
lavenderPro.description: Soft purple palette with rich violet accents.

rubyRed.name: Ruby Red
rubyRed.description: Cream white with bold red accents — premium and confident.

lora.name: Lora
lora.description: Elegant serif for a refined look.

hero.title: Your whole household, one workspace
hero.subtitle: Share shopping lists with family or roommates. Members join free — one Family subscription funds the household.

freeHero.title: Shop solo on Free
freeHero.subtitle: Your basic grocery list works great for one person. Subscribe to Family workspace to share lists and sync with your household.

workspaceOverview.title: Two profiles, zero overlap
workspaceOverview.personal: Personal — your private receipts, pantry, and spending.
workspaceOverview.family: Family Workspace — shared with household members. Data never mixes with Personal.
workspaceOverview.switcher: Use the Personal | My Household switcher on Home, Receipts, and Pantry.

step1.title: Get your family code
step1.body: Every household gets a unique code. Share it with your spouse or kids so they can join.

step2.title: Share a shopping list
step2.body: When your list is ready, tap Share with family to send it to everyone.

step3.title: They add it on their phone
step3.body: Family members paste the invite you sent and choose to merge or start a new list.

sync.title: Stay in sync automatically
sync.body: With an active Family workspace, everyone sees list updates without copying and pasting each time.

familyCode.title: Your family code
familyCode.hintUnlocked: Available with Family workspace — share lists with your household.
familyCode.hintLocked: Subscribe to Family workspace — invite members free.
familyCode.tapToUnlock: Tap to unlock with Family workspace

emailInvite.title: Invite by email
emailInvite.hint: Send a household invite link to a family member. They join free — your Family subscription covers the workspace.
emailInvite.subject: Join our Penny Pantry household

shareList.title: Share a shopping list
shareList.hint: Send your active list to family members so they can shop from the same plan.

sync.title: Multi-user sync
sync.hintActive: Lists update across every family member's phone — no copy and paste needed.
sync.supabaseHint: Live sync needs Supabase configured (EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL). Copy/paste sharing still works.
sync.upgradeHint: Upgrade to Family workspace for automatic sync — everyone sees the same list.

receive.title: Receive a shared list
receive.hint: Paste the invite link or code a family member sent you.
receive.placeholder: Paste invite link or code from family member…

compare.title: What you get with Family workspace
compare.item1: • Shared lists & live sync for your household
compare.item2: • Invite members free — no Pro required

noLists.title: No lists yet
noLists.message: Create a shopping list first, then share it with your family.

shareFailed.title: Share failed
shareFailed.buildMessage: Could not build your list for sharing. Try again.
shareFailed.genericMessage: Could not share your list. Try again.

shareSuccess.title: Shared with family
shareSuccess.syncedMessage: Your list is live for your household — invite link copied to the share sheet.
shareSuccess.upgradeMessage: List shared via invite link. Upgrade to Pro for automatic sync.
shareSuccess.supabaseMessage: List shared via invite link. Connect Supabase for live sync across devices.

couldNotReadInvite.title: Couldn't read invite
couldNotReadInvite.message: Paste a family code, invite link, or the full list JSON your family member sent.
couldNotReadInvite.fallbackMessage: Paste the invite link or code your family member sent.

syncComplete.title: Sync complete
syncComplete.updated_one: Updated {{count}} shared list across your household.
syncComplete.updated_other: Updated {{count}} shared lists across your household.
syncComplete.upToDate: Everything is already up to date.

inviteCopied.title: Invite copied
inviteCopied.message: Send this to family members so they can join and receive your lists.
